# Tessl Docs

## Tessl

- [What is Tessl?](https://docs.tessl.io/overview/readme.md)
- [Quick start: package manager for context](https://docs.tessl.io/introduction-to-tessl/quickstart-skills-docs-rules.md): See how skills, docs, and rules work together to make your agent more effective
- [How Tessl works](https://docs.tessl.io/introduction-to-tessl/how-tessl-works.md): Explore how Tessl makes context available to agents, covering the different context types, and how agents receive and use this context.
- [Sign up for Tessl](https://docs.tessl.io/introduction-to-tessl/sign-up-for-tessl.md)
- [Installation](https://docs.tessl.io/introduction-to-tessl/installation.md): A step-by-step guide on how to install, update or remove the Tessl CLI.
- [Context Lifecycle](https://docs.tessl.io/introduction-to-tessl/context-lifecycle.md): Understanding the complete lifecycle for managing agent context as software
- [Enhance your workflow with skills](https://docs.tessl.io/use/enhance-your-workflow-with-skills.md): Learn how to discover and install skills that enhance your agent's capabilities with procedural workflows
- [Make your agents smarter with documentation](https://docs.tessl.io/use/make-your-agents-smarter-with-documentation.md): In this tutorial we'll help you install and update tiles containing library documentation, using FastAPI, a popular Python API framework as an example.
- [Spec-Driven Development with Tessl](https://docs.tessl.io/use/spec-driven-development-with-tessl.md)
- [Creating skills](https://docs.tessl.io/create/creating-skills.md): Learn how to create and manage skills using Tessl.
- [Creating documentation](https://docs.tessl.io/create/creating-documentation.md): Learn how to add documentation to Tessl packages to provide usage information and examples to AI agents.
- [Autogenerating documentation](https://docs.tessl.io/create/autogenerating-documentation.md)
- [Creating tiles](https://docs.tessl.io/create/creating-tiles.md): Learn how to create your own skills, docs, and rules to share with your team
- [Developing tiles locally](https://docs.tessl.io/create/developing-tiles-locally.md): Develop and test tiles locally
- [Review a skill against best practices](https://docs.tessl.io/evaluate/evaluating-skills.md): How to review and optimize skills to ensure they follow best practices
- [Optimize a skill using best practices](https://docs.tessl.io/evaluate/optimize-a-skill-using-best-practices.md)
- [Evaluate skill quality using scenarios](https://docs.tessl.io/evaluate/evaluate-skill-quality-using-scenarios.md)
- [Evaluate your codebase agent readiness](https://docs.tessl.io/evaluate/evaluating-your-codebase.md)
- [Evaluating documentation](https://docs.tessl.io/evaluate/evaluating-documentation.md): Understanding documentation evaluations and how to request them
- [Distributing via registry](https://docs.tessl.io/distribute/distributing-via-registry.md): Distribute, share, and maintain tiles through the Tessl Registry
- [Sharing with your team and publicly](https://docs.tessl.io/distribute/sharing-tiles-publicly.md): Making your tiles publicly discoverable in the Tessl Registry
- [Rollout to your repositories](https://docs.tessl.io/distribute/rollout-to-your-repositories.md): Connect Tessl to your codebase to automatically generate, evaluate, and optimize context!
- [Using tiles directly from your repo](https://docs.tessl.io/distribute/repository-tiles.md): Use tiles directly from your repository for codebase-specific context
- [CLI commands](https://docs.tessl.io/reference/cli-commands.md)
- [Configuration files](https://docs.tessl.io/reference/configuration.md)
- [Custom agent setup](https://docs.tessl.io/reference/custom-agent-setup.md)
- [MCP tools](https://docs.tessl.io/reference/mcp-tools.md): Overview of Tessl MCP tools for AI coding agents.
- [Roles](https://docs.tessl.io/reference/roles.md)
- [Glossary](https://docs.tessl.io/reference/glossary.md): Key concepts and terminology used throughout Tessl.
- [FAQs](https://docs.tessl.io/support/faqs.md): Find quick answers to the most common questions about Tessl.
- [Troubleshooting](https://docs.tessl.io/support/troubleshooting.md)
- [Changelog](https://docs.tessl.io/changelog.md): Latest version = 0.73.0
